method: Local evidence only. Statuses are conservative and based on runtime files, nearby smoke/proof files, and repo-owned audit/directive text already present in this tree.

status_legend.shipped: Runnable surface plus meaningful local smoke/proof evidence.
status_legend.partial: Some runnable surface or implementation evidence exists, but proof coverage and/or self-declared completion is incomplete.
status_legend.concept: No clear runtime, or local evidence explicitly positions the folder as concept/demo/catalog material.

2026.basis: Top-level proof now confirms the folder is a mixed branch cluster with many launch pages plus a few heavier sub-branches, and the local classification file explicitly warns against treating the whole tree as shipped.

AE-Central-CommandHub.basis: Top-level launcher shell now has a local proof lane for manifest/service-worker wiring, page-partial coverage, local state/backup hooks, bundled target presence, and explicit shell-vs-walkthrough classification.

AE-FlowPro.basis: Static PWA runtime now has a local proof lane for persistence, export hooks, encrypted backup hooks, and service-worker presence; backend and multi-user sync remain unproven here.

AppointmentSetter.basis: Explicit Python server runtime and local smoke harness with last smoke report present.

BrandID-Offline-PWA.basis: Static offline shell exists and now has a local smoke proof for service-worker/offline-shell contracts, but not full first-load offline or live submission proof.

BusinessLaunchGo.basis: Real browser app surface plus a local proof lane documenting ZIP/PDF/lead/error-report/function contracts while clearly scoping unproven hosted integrations.

DualLaneFunnel.basis: Runnable funnel surface plus a local proof lane for the two public lanes, diagnostics surface, and function contracts; deployed persistence remains external.

Featured-on-SkyeSol.basis: Top-level proof confirms this folder is an inventory/classification layer, and the repo-owned inventory explicitly classifies large parts of the estate as release/demo/concept or sales material.

GateProofx.basis: Static reader/export surface now has a local proof lane, but deployed archive endpoint behavior is still external to this folder.

JobPing.basis: Node app contract plus multiple local smoke/proof scripts and proof docs.

LocalSeoSnapshot.basis: Real browser scoring tool plus a local proof lane for scoring, persistence, PDF wiring, lead capture, and function contract presence.

MaggiesStore.basis: Runnable app contract plus multiple local proof-smoke scripts.

NeuralSpacePro.basis: Static workspace shell now has a local proof lane for Firebase auth wiring, runtime-host gateway chat wiring, service-worker registration, canvas/editor surface presence, and a same-origin proof runtime with local session archive routes; live gateway execution and CDN/runtime availability remain unresolved.

Offline First Tools.basis: Top-level proof confirms this folder is a redirect mirror into the canonical 2026 utility set rather than a standalone implementation home.

QR-Code-Generator.basis: Static browser QR utility now has a local proof lane for canvas rendering, PNG export, and PDF export hooks; automated browser rendering and CDN independence are still unproven.

Repo Live.basis: Static browser tool surface now has a local proof lane for intake/run/report shell contracts and required browser headers, but not full WebContainer execution.

SkyDexia.basis: Multiple runtime-oriented .mjs entrypoints and substantial local proof inventory under proofs/ and integration/.

Skye Identity Standard: Global Command C.runtime_entrypoint: Skye Identity Standard: Global Command Center/index.html
Skye Identity Standard: Global Command C.smoke_or_proof_file: Skye Identity Standard: Global Command Center/smoke/smoke-proof.mjs
Skye Identity Standard: Global Command C.basis: Static local command-center pages now have a local proof lane, but the in-folder proof still stops short of a full local command-center runtime.

Skye Profit Console.basis: Static product shell now has a local proof lane plus a browser-local planning worksheet and ledger subset with snapshot storage, derived bookkeeping metrics, audit flags, and JSON/CSV export, but the underlying hosted bookkeeping runtime it describes is not proven in this folder.

SkyeDexiaNeural.basis: Browser UI plus worker/3D wiring now have a self-contained local proof runtime lane, with worker secret handling scoped to the session and local project/artifact inspection routes, but full behavior still depends on remote worker availability and live browser execution.

SkyeDocxMax.basis: Smoke scripts exist, but the local directive explicitly says true .docx support is not yet fully verified and lists pending smoke-proof items.

SkyeForgeMax.basis: Static shell plus a self-contained local runtime API lane are now proven in-folder, including /health, /v1/state, latest-proof inspection, /v1/proof-runs history, and local /v1/e2e/run artifact generation; deployed runtime behavior and live provider-backed integrations remain unresolved.

SkyeGateFS13.basis: Node app contract with gateway-oriented proof surfaces and local smoke/verification scripts.

SkyeLeadVault.basis: Public and admin shells plus lead/scoring handlers now have a local proof lane, with session-scoped browser auth, canonical stage wiring, local operator credential login, and protected browser actions wired through that local handoff; real identity-provider handoff and deployed behavior remain unresolved.

SkyeMail.basis: Standalone and suite surfaces now have a local proof lane plus build reproduction checks; live provider and deployed function behavior remain env-dependent.

SkyeMediaCenter.basis: Browser upload/admin shells and media handlers now have a local proof lane, with session-scoped browser auth, local operator credential login, truthful draft-versus-published behavior, local media-file retrieval, and protected operations wired through that local handoff; real identity-provider handoff and deployed file-serving behavior remain unresolved.

SkyeMusicNexus.basis: Artist, release, and payments handlers now have a local proof lane, with session-scoped browser auth, local operator credential login, protected browser actions, and local payout/analytics flows proven; real identity-provider handoff and live distribution integrations remain unresolved.

SkyeProfitConsole.basis: The alias/redirect surface now has a local proof lane, but it is not its own independent application runtime.

SkyeProofx.basis: Standalone browser app now has a local proof lane for crypto/PWA markers, local export/verify markers, browser-local activity and verification-report export, and tightened runtime-boundary copy, but full browser end-to-end vault creation/open/verify is still unproven.

SkyeRoutex.basis: Node app contract and named smoke harness with supporting smoke output files.

SkyeWebCreatorMax.basis: Static app entrypoint with multiple dedicated smoke/readiness scripts.

SuperIDEv2.basis: Substantial smoke/runbook material exists, but the estate-level audit classifies this suite as real yet not fully closed by proof/completion criteria.

SuperIDEv3.8.basis: Large runnable suite with smoke surfaces, but the estate-level audit classifies it as real yet not fully closed by proof/completion criteria.

ValleyVerified-v2.basis: Operator-facing dashboard and function/shared-lib surface now have a local proof lane; live auth/provider-backed fulfillment is still not proven end to end.

kAIxU-PDF-Pro.basis: Static/PWA document suite now has a local proof lane covering route pages, export hooks, manifest, and same-origin runtime contracts.

kAIxUBrandKit.basis: Static export surface and Netlify function contract now have a local proof lane; live gateway inference still depends on deployment env.

kAIxUChatv6.7.basis: Top-level proof confirms this folder is a single branded launch surface with gateway/server-side-key claims but no local backend/runtime implementation.

kAIxUDeltaGate.basis: Static directive/tester surface now has a local proof lane with an honest request-planning helper, curl guidance, browser guardrails, and a self-contained same-folder proof API for health/models/generate/stream/request-history behavior, but external gateway health and provider-backed generation remain unproven here.

kAIxUGateway13.basis: Node app contract with local gateway smoke surfaces and proof-oriented files.

skAIxuIDEPro.basis: Suite has multiple local smoke and verification scripts, but the estate-level audit classifies it as real yet not fully closed by proof/completion criteria.

skyeroutex-workforce-command-v0.4.0.basis: Node app contract plus extensive local smoke suite across auth, audit, browser, integration, deploy, and storage surfaces.

could_not_classify_confidently: Skye Identity Standard: Global Command Center
